heading: Perfect Brows,
script: Enhance your natural beauty with soft, natural, bespoke brows
sub: CPD Certified Microblading Artist · Fully insured
bodyHeading: Bespoke brow design, tailored to you
body1: Professional bespoke brow design tailored to your face shape using the latest tools such as 'Nano Blades' which help to create the crispest hair strokes, and the latest products so you can feel colour confident with one of the UK's most talked about brands of pigments — Perma Blend!
body2: Natural, hair-stroke technique with brow mapping included for long-lasting, low-maintenance results.
note: a patch test is required before your appointment. A pre-appointment consultation is included, and every treatment is safe, hygienic, and compliant with UK standards.
